name: Database Sentinel
description_en: A multi-backend database security auditor for Supabase, Firebase, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, and MySQL—flags RLS/rule misconfigurations, exposed credentials, auth bypasses, and known CVEs.
description_zh: 跨后端的数据库安全审计器,覆盖 Supabase、Firebase、MongoDB、PostgreSQL 与 MySQL——识别 RLS/规则配置错误、凭据外泄、认证绕过与已知 CVE。
long_en: Built for hardening "vibe-coded" apps from Lovable/Bolt/Replit/Cursor; checks for exposed storage, ghost auth, and specific CVEs across each backend's rules and access model.
long_zh: 面向加固 Lovable/Bolt/Replit/Cursor 等「随手生成」的应用;逐后端检查存储暴露、幽灵认证与特定 CVE 的规则与访问模型。
sec_note_en: Reads your database configuration and rules to produce an audit; supply read-scoped credentials and review findings before acting.
sec_note_zh: 读取你的数据库配置与规则以生成审计;请提供只读凭据并在处置前审阅结论。
